reviews.comment:
Malísima la atención de una chica del personal (joven rubia)  en caja, cómo atiende & falta de educación, aparte de que entregaron la merienda fría. Mal momento para sus compañeras & desgraciadamente para los que estaban presentes.
La educación ante todo please

(Translated by Google)
The service from a young blonde woman at the register was appalling. Her behavior and lack of manners were appalling, and the snacks were served cold. It was a terrible experience for her colleagues and, unfortunately, for everyone else present. Please, let's have some manners.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNTcTRpTUl3EAE
